_note: M5-F4 defensive per-panel a11y coverage fragment (create-or-append). The M5-F6 a11y harness reconciles these fragments via append-only union-merge; a per-panel filename keeps F4/F6 conflict-free. If F6 landed a monolithic manifest instead, ingest src/editor/gui/a11y/coverage/*.json.

a11y_scan.assertion: uitree::audit_a11y() returns zero violations for the Problems panel across empty / navigable / provisional / grouped / non-navigable diagnostic sets (including with an active navigation target)

keyboard_nav.assertion: uitree::focus_order() reaches every rendered diagnostic row and the problems.navigate command has a keyboard path (complete keyboard-only navigation)
